summary: Operating sweep is active across exec lanes. Engineering reconciliation is underway under expanded CTO authority; product coherence and growth are in motion; archive and efficiency were activated because board and memory hygiene were thin; backend remains the clearest active blocker.

items.note: Owns the full engineering sweep across frontend, backend, ui-integration, parity-qa, spec-stitching, platform, and devops.
Driving prototype and brief coherence for the Activated Brief Status wave.
Launch lane is active; concrete shipped growth outputs are not yet visible on the board.
Closing archive and board hygiene gaps after an effectively empty digest and memory baseline.
Activated Brief Status view files were written; frontend scope is now narrowed to view construction.
Recon identified `frontend/src/ActivatedBriefStatusView.tsx`; CEO requested integration-closure handoff from that artifact.
Monitoring implementation companion remains partial/truncated; CTO paused the completion loop and escalated the blocker.
Under CTO reconciliation authority; no fresh blocking board evidence yet beyond backend.
Activated Brief Status is the active product wave.
Canonical funnel remains visit -> brief-created -> brief-shared -> reply-received -> account-converted; activation remains brief-shared.
Current product work is focused on post-activation core experience clarity rather than new scope.
Growth was activated in the operating sweep to advance launch assets.
No concrete growth deliverable is yet visible in the recent board slice.
Archivist was activated to snapshot the phase transition.
Efficiency was activated to assess whether current parallel execution is healthy.
Board digest has no entries and memory was described as effectively empty, so freshness discipline is part of this sweep.
Partial artifact could not be confirmed complete because builder output truncated repeatedly.

freshness.sourceWindow: CEO operating sweep and board activity through 2026-04-29T22:14:30Z
freshness.note: High confidence on active lanes and blockers; lower confidence on exact progress inside growth/archive/efficiency because outputs are only partially visible so far.
